en: I'm sorry. Where are you going to go? Buenos Aires.
I can lie low there, maybe sniff out a job when things quiet down.
You? Stayed, sir. Send my regards.
He saw the art. Thought to come to me and bargain for his life.
So, I offer you the satisfaction.
It's not the way I deal with things.
What will you do with it? Nothing.
ko: 그와는 어떻게 할 건데? 아무것도 안 해.

en: But I can't speak for Coble Engineering.
ko: 하지만 글로벌 엔지니어링에 대해서는 내가 말할 수 없어.
